current_phase.label: Host boundary and autonomous development process foundation

current_milestone.label: Create standalone platform repo and codify anti-drift workflow gates

progress_summary: Standalone platform repository has been created to prevent platform-core work from drifting into managed business projects. Existing Chinese design docs, capability matrix, recovery redesign, and PC/mobile visual drafts are copied into this repo. The first code-level gate validates host-boundary routing before implementation.
next_step: Use this repo as the host for the next platform implementation trial: generate Context Pack, dispatch bounded implementation, review output, and iterate gates before expanding platform features.
